name: Mark Zuckerberg
executiveSummary:
Mark Zuckerberg is an American computer programmer, entrepreneur, and billionaire. He is the co-founder, chairman, and CEO of Meta Platforms (formerly Facebook, Inc.), the parent company of Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Reality Labs.

Zuckerberg famously founded Facebook from his Harvard dormitory in 2004, scaling it into the world's largest social network. Currently, he is heavily investing in the metaverse, virtual reality, and open-source artificial intelligence models (Llama).
biography:
Zuckerberg was born in White Plains, New York. An adept programmer from a young age, he enrolled at Harvard University in 2002. In 2004, he launched 'Thefacebook' with his college roommates. The site quickly expanded to other universities and eventually the general public, prompting Zuckerberg to drop out of Harvard to focus entirely on the company.

Under his leadership, Facebook became the dominant force in global social media. He orchestrated massive acquisitions, buying Instagram for $1 billion in 2012 and WhatsApp for $19 billion in 2014. In 2021, he rebranded the company to Meta to reflect its new focus on building the metaverse.

Zuckerberg has faced significant public and congressional scrutiny over data privacy, election interference, and content moderation. He is also a major philanthropist, pledging to give away 99% of his Meta shares over his lifetime through the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative, aimed at curing diseases and improving education.

recentNews.title: Llama 3 AI Models
recentNews.description: Releasing state-of-the-art open-source AI models, challenging proprietary models from OpenAI and Google.

recentNews.title: Metaverse Hardware
recentNews.description: Continuing massive investments in Reality Labs and releasing updated Meta Quest headsets and Ray-Ban smart glasses.
